title: Direction
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Direction helper that replaces the upstream React context provider with explicit direction data, dir attributes, local data-direction attributes, and direction-aware examples.

registry.reason: Direction examples compose local shadcn Button helpers instead of origin app aliases.
Direction examples compose local shadcn Input helpers instead of origin app aliases.
Direction examples compose local shadcn Label helpers instead of origin app aliases.
Direction and its local card preview use the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for direction values.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: The upstream React DirectionProvider/useDirection context is replaced by explicit Foldkit direction values passed into view renderers.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin RTL preview language switching is replaced by deterministic local LTR and RTL example data.
The origin Direction docs preview uses Card before a local shadcn Card registry item exists; Direction examples use a local card shell copied from origin classes.
Origin Button imports are replaced by the local shadcn Button registry dependency.
Origin Input imports are replaced by the local shadcn Input registry dependency.
Origin Label imports are replaced by the local shadcn Label registry dependency.

examples.title: DirectionDemo
examples.description: LTR login card using explicit direction attributes and local shadcn form controls.

examples.title: DirectionRtlCard
examples.description: RTL login card preserving the shadcn Direction docs preview copy and direction behavior with local deterministic Arabic data.

deviations.summary: The upstream React DirectionProvider/useDirection context is replaced by explicit direction values and attributes passed through Foldkit renderers.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React context providers or upstream Base UI runtime packages. Explicit model/view data preserves the direction contract within Elm Architecture.

deviations.summary: The docs card preview is represented with a local card shell and local Button, Input, and Label helpers instead of importing origin app aliases.
deviations.rationale: The Direction row should stay small and must not introduce a new Card registry item or origin language-selector dependency.
